# BP-85 safe: the handler checks whether the request context value has the expected type.
lang: go
file: BP-85-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type userKey struct{}
type User struct{ Name string }

func userHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	user, ok := r.Context().Value(userKey{}).(User)
	if !ok {
		http.Error(w, "missing user", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = user
}
